entities.name: FINGER MILLET
entities.description: A key food security crop widely grown in eastern Africa, India, and Nepal.

entities.name: EASTERN AFRICA
entities.description: A region where finger millet is widely grown.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country where finger millet is widely grown.

entities.name: NEPAL
entities.description: A country where finger millet is widely grown.

entities.name: CLIMATE RESILIENCE
entities.description: The ability of finger millet to withstand climate-related stresses.

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL QUALITIES
entities.description: The health-promoting properties of finger millet grain.

entities.name: GENOME ASSEMBLY AND ANNOTATION
entities.description: The process of creating a chromosome-scale reference genome for finger millet.

entities.name: ALLOTETRAPLOID
entities.description: A genomic state characterized by four sets of chromosomes derived from different species.

entities.name: HOMOEOLOGOUS GENE RETENTION
entities.description: The maintenance of similar genes from different subgenomes in an allotetraploid.

entities.name: SUBGENOME DOMINANCE
entities.description: The phenomenon where one subgenome is more expressed or retained than another.

entities.name: POPULATION STRUCTURE
entities.description: The genetic distribution and variation within the finger millet population.

entities.name: TRAIT MAPPING
entities.description: A technique used to link phenotypic traits to specific genomic regions.

entities.name: VARIANT ANALYSIS
entities.description: The analysis of genetic variations to identify candidate genes for a trait.

entities.name: PURPLE COLORATION OF ANTHERS AND STIGMA
entities.description: A pigmentation trait in finger millet involving the anthers and stigma.

entities.name: LOSS-OF-FUNCTION MUTATIONS
entities.description: Mutations that result in the inactivation of a gene's function.

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A crop used as a reference for orthologous anthocyanin regulatory genes.

entities.name: R1/B1
entities.description: Anthocyanin regulatory genes found in maize.

entities.name: ARABIDOPSIS
entities.description: A model organism used as a reference for orthologous anthocyanin regulatory genes.

entities.name: GL3/EGL3
entities.description: Anthocyanin regulatory genes found in Arabidopsis.

entities.name: ANTHOCYANIN REGULATORY GENES
entities.description: Genes that control the production of anthocyanin pigments.

entities.name: PROANTHOCYANIDIN PRODUCTION
entities.description: The biological process of producing proanthocyanidins in the seed.
